overview: A localized disaster response application that combines weather data, alert notifications, and rapid information access for flood-prone communities.
challenge: The main challenge was turning live weather data into clear, actionable alerts that users could trust quickly during severe conditions.
solution: I structured the app around a lightweight alert pipeline that pulls forecast data, filters risk levels, and presents simplified community-facing warnings.

overview: A modular traffic control simulator for modeling vehicle flow, signal timing, and intersection behavior through structured data handling.
challenge: The core difficulty was keeping the simulation state predictable while traffic events changed in real time.
solution: I used linked structures and finite state logic to keep the traffic model responsive, traceable, and easy to extend.

overview: An automated smart agriculture prototype that monitors microclimate conditions and regulates soil vitals in real time.
challenge: The challenge was to read unstable analog sensor values reliably and trigger watering only when thresholds demanded it.
solution: I built a microcontroller feedback loop that samples temperature and moisture, then activates a pump through a relay when the soil dries out.

overview: A biometric terminal that evaluates front, left, and right facial profiles and ranks matches through a structured verification pipeline.
challenge: The main issue was preserving accuracy when a user presented different face angles under inconsistent capture conditions.
solution: I modeled the pipeline around normalized profile comparison and a baseline score so recognition could degrade gracefully instead of failing abruptly.

overview: A proposed attendance system that combines QR scanning and location tracking to simplify daily class logging.
challenge: The challenge was keeping attendance fast for students while still preserving basic location validation.
solution: I framed the workflow around QR generation, scan capture, and a location-aware validation step for cleaner attendance records.

overview: A performance evaluation of A* and Greedy Best-First Search inside a sliding 8-tile puzzle environment.
challenge: The key task was comparing strategies fairly while keeping the puzzle state and evaluation criteria consistent.
solution: I built a controlled comparison flow that measured search behavior across the same problem space and summarized the tradeoffs clearly.

overview: A prototype mobile app for browsing schedules, selecting seats, and making reservations inside a cinema booking flow.
challenge: The challenge was presenting schedules and seat selection in a way that felt simple on mobile while keeping the booking steps clear.
solution: I organized the app around schedule browsing, seat selection, and reservation confirmation to keep the booking experience focused.

overview: A pet adoption platform that enables users to browse available pets, filter by characteristics, and submit adoption applications through a streamlined digital workflow.
challenge: The challenge was presenting detailed pet profiles and matching criteria in an intuitive way while keeping the adoption application process simple and encouraging.
solution: I designed the platform around pet browsing with filters, detailed profile cards, and a focused adoption workflow that guides users through each step clearly.
